goal: Close the 3 HIGH money-path gaps from phase-1 verification — no false-success toasts, no silently-swallowed errors, no silent personal-DM fallback for the accounting group.
why: Phase-1 build FAILED verification with 3 HIGH gaps on the admin invoice money path. Artifacts exist and tsc/build pass; what's broken is error-path honesty. This gap-closure fixes ONLY those 3 findings.
success_criteria: A partial failure in the admin auto-issue chain (composer or draft-act) shows an honest distinct toast, never the false full-success message.
On handleCreate partial failure the UI reconciles to the real DB state, not the stale created snapshot.
handleAct draft failures surface an error toast instead of silence.
With INVOICE_ACCOUNTING_GROUP_MSISDN unset, no invoice or credit-note notification reaches any personal number; both senders return/skip with a warn-log.
npx tsc --noEmit and npm run build pass.

tasks.title: Honest toasts + error handling on both admin auto-issue paths
acceptance_criteria: Full approve -> mark-paid -> group-notify chain in handleCreate shows the existing full-success toast.

Any throw in that chain shows the distinct partial toast 'Invoice numbered — mark paid manually and retry the group send.' and reconciles to real DB state via loadDocumentsAction, not the stale created snapshot.
handleAct draft path (invoice and non-invoice branches) wrapped in try/catch; on throw shows 'Couldn't issue this invoice — please try again.' and console.error-logs.
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 and npm run build exits 0.
tasks.action: Gap 1 (handleCreate invoice branch): add let fullyIssued=false; set true as last try statement after notifyAccountingGroupOfInvoiceAction; in catch keep console.error then re-fetch via loadDocumentsAction() into result/selectId; after try/catch reconcile then setToast(fullyIssued ? full-success : partial 'Invoice numbered...'). Gap 2 (handleAct draft): wrap the whole startTransition body in try/catch with console.error + setToast('Couldn't issue this invoice — please try again.').

tasks.title: Remove silent personal-DM fallback for the accounting group + document the env var
acceptance_criteria: With INVOICE_ACCOUNTING_GROUP_MSISDN set, both group senders post to that number unchanged.
With it unset, sendDocumentToAccountingGroup sends nothing to any personal number, warn-logs, and returns false.
With it unset, the credit-note group sender (was documents.ts:386-388) also sends nothing to a personal number and warn-logs.
grep -c 'Marios Polyviou' lib/invoices/actions/documents.ts returns 1 (only the DM approval path at line 130 remains).
.env.example contains INVOICE_ACCOUNTING_GROUP_MSISDN= with an explanatory comment.
tasks.action: Replace both 'process.env.INVOICE_ACCOUNTING_GROUP_MSISDN ?? INVOICE_AUTHORIZED_AGENTS.find(Marios Polyviou)?.msisdn' fallbacks (documents.ts ~386 and ~424) with 'const groupMsisdn = process.env.INVOICE_ACCOUNTING_GROUP_MSISDN?.trim() || undefined;'. Keep the existing if(!groupMsisdn){warn;return} guards; add a warn-log to the credit-note guard if absent. Do not touch the Marios DM path at line 130. Append INVOICE_ACCOUNTING_GROUP_MSISDN= with a comment to .env.example.
